question: 对全年数据做超预算专项扫描。按reimburse_date和record_id依次累计部门已批准费用，每个超预算部门形成1项发现，以首次使累计支出超过年度预算且无专项审批的记录作为关键record_id。

scope.audit_object: department budget overrun without special approval

policy_questions.question: What policy governs department budget limits and over-budget special approval?

data_questions: List all approved expenses for the full year, ordered by reimburse_date and record_id
Get annual budget for each department
Compute cumulative approved spending per department
Identify first record per department where cumulative > budget AND special_approval is false
Check if any over-budget department had special_approval on all subsequent records
evidence_requirements: All approved expense records across all departments and dates
Special approval status for over-budget records
execution_steps: 2. Authorize and launch data analyst subagent for batch aggregation
4. Wait for subagent result, then complete_audit_subagent

reasons: policy version check needed: confirm 2025 policy applies
aggregation/grouping/batch: cumulative sum by department across all records

subagent_plan.task: Compute cumulative approved spending per department ordered by reimburse_date and record_id, compare to annual budgets, and identify the first record per department where cumulative exceeds budget without special approval. Also identify departments that exceed budget but have special_approval on all over-budget records (then those are exempt).

stopping_conditions: All approved expenses retrieved and processed
All over-budget findings identified with key record_ids
